action_boundary: May customer operations release the refund against remaining balance?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, pressure, plausibility, or availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Order ORD-ORCHID-025 original refundable amount is USD 4600.
Prior refund ledger PRIOR-ORCHID-025 shows USD 900 previously refunded.
Remaining balance record BAL-ORCHID-025 shows USD 3700 remaining refundable balance.
Refund request REQ-ORCHID-025 requests USD 3700 to original payment rail.
Refund release is complete only when requested refund does not exceed remaining refundable balance after prior partial refunds and adjustments.
